channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Chest of drawers and bedding..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wyndcliff Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street drain blocked, 2nd May
item.description:
The pavement drain on Colombia road/York way outside the Fellow pub has been blocked for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12-16, York Way, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disintegrating street bollard, 2nd May
item.description:
Black metal street bollard falling apart - now at dangerous state after being recently hit by delivery van. Outside the Indian Rickshaw Restaurant, 16 Battersea Square, SW11 3RA

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Battersea Square, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "Recycling" not collected, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of green recycling bags in a cardboard box, not collected on Friday morning. Probably because it's full of hard plastic items that aren't considered recyclable. Obviously nobody's taking it back in. Thanks for sorting it out.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Skipworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: FlyTip General, 2nd May
item.description:
Setchell way by the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Curtis Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Black Bags & Mirror on the footway. Wadding Street LP 2 O/S Blockfield House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Content Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped in the street, 2nd May
item.description:
Mattress dumped out side school in oakmere rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas bottles left on footway, 2nd May
item.description:
Small gas bottles have been dumped on the footway, may cause an issue with the high temperatures.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ascot Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard with bumps on pavement, 2nd May
item.description:
An elderly man tripped on the raided bumps on the tarmac area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hythe Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car is repeatedly illegaly parking in this spot near my home., 2nd May
item.description:
The owner takes no notice of parking tickets. Continues to park here over many months. Car may be abandoned as not moving.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, New Wharf Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised bike, 2nd May
item.description:
Vandalised bike, not from any popular providers, so can’t report it via their app

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Green Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial Fly Tipping - Public Highway, 2nd May
item.description:
The Three Hounds Bar has for several years consistently left their commercial waste on the public highway, outside of their collection window and outside of their planning permission which states it should be from the rear of the premises. They have been issued an enforcement notice but are still continuing to fly tip commercial wastes I urge you to follow up on this continued breach and issue further enforcement against the business that continues to flout these rules or issue them with an appropriate fine as the enforcement notice has not worked as a deterrent to stop the issue occurring. These continued breaches are a disturbance to local residents, the local community and their highway use as well as encouraging further littering and resident infestations also making it a public health nuisance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of left over rubbish and cannisters, 2nd May
item.description:
Local residents have been amazing at clearing up after an antisocial event last night that left behind lots of drug related items and left over food and drinks. Please can this be removed today. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawkinge Walk, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rochester Terrace Gardens, 2nd May
item.description:
News trees have not been watered in nearly two weeks and the hydration bags are empty.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17A, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Watering - Young tree not being watered

item.title: Baby pram left by bus stop, 2nd May
item.description:
Someone from Mems Barbers came and casually dropped this at 10.15 today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vape equipment, 2nd May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
